citation: 12 CFR §1026.43(e)(2) - APR-APOR spread exactly at General-QM threshold (`<=` boundary)
comment: Hand-calc: first-lien high band -> threshold = 2.25 pp = 0.0225 fractional. apr=0.0725, apor=0.0500 -> Decimal('0.0725') - Decimal('0.0500') = Decimal('0.0225') exactly (Decimal arithmetic is exact, no precision drift). Spread = 0.0225 = threshold exactly -> general_qm_passes=True (regulation uses `<=`, so exactly-at-threshold counts as within threshold). Pins Pitfall 11.
